Tasnim News Agency reported, citing an informed source, that media reports regarding the mechanism for the passage of naval vessels through the Strait of Hormuz are unfounded.

It added that the sovereignty enforcement system over the Strait of Hormuz was designed and implemented by Iran.

Tasnim said that ships intending to transit the Strait of Hormuz receive emails from the address "info@PGSA.ir" containing transit regulations highlighting that no official sources have yet announced the precise details of this mechanism.

#IranWar #WestAsia #StraitofHormuz #Iran

Professor Mohammad Marandi tells Al Mayadeen that Iran does not seek to disrupt global shipping or harm sailors in the Strait of Hormuz, stressing that restrictions imposed by Tehran target countries that backed US and Israeli actions against Iran. 

Marandi argues that Tehran changed its policy in the Strait of Hormuz only after violations of the ceasefire agreement by US President Trump and Israeli PM Netanyahu.

@s_m_marandi 

#IranWar #AlMayadeen #StraitofHormuz #WestAsia

Talk to reporters at the White House, the US President said that he believes "it's very possible that we'll make a deal," saying that the #US and Iran "had very good talks over the last 24 hours."

#Trump repeated claims of having depleted Iran's military capabilities, alleging, "They don’t have any planes… no anti-aircraft… no radar left."

He further alleged that "their missiles are mostly decimated," claiming, "I think we won."

Reiterating his demand, Trump said, "#Iran cannot have a nuclear weapon… and they won’t."

#IranWar #WarOnIran

"الولايات المتحدة لا يمكن أن تتخلى عن دول مجلس التعاون الخليجي التي تُعدّ جزءاً أساسياً من اقتصادها، وفي حال كفّت يدها عن هذه المنطقة، فإنّ الاقتصاد الأميركي قد يتضعضع بشكل كبير."

مدير مكتب الميادين في جنيف، موسى عاصي

#الميادين

In an exclusive interview for Al Mayadeen, Iran’s Expediency Discernment Council member, Major General Mohsen Rezaei, argued that the #US is repeating a failed post–Cold War playbook in the region. 

From former President George W. Bush to President Donald Trump, Rezaei said US attempts to dominate the region’s power balance have led to a "dead end".

Rezaei further insisted the "Persian Gulf must remain independent."

#IranWar #WarOnIran #Iran

Al Mayadeen's correspondent reported a preliminary toll of two martyrs and seven wounded in the Israeli attack on a residential building in Haret Hreik in #Beirut's Southern Suburb.

The attack marked the first one on the suburb, coming amid continued Israeli assaults on southern Lebanon and the Bekaa in violation of the ceasefire that took effect at midnight on April 16–17, 2026.
